rules.message: Only {judged_count}/{cutoff} ranked hits have durable judgments.
rules.suggested_action: Label the unjudged top-ranked evidence before changing retrieval weights or filters.
Review query terms, applied metadata filters, and ranking boost rules before promoting this search profile.

rules.message: nDCG@k is {ndcg_at_k}, which means relevant evidence is not ordered near the top.
rules.suggested_action: Inspect score components, reranker configuration, and source-diversity selections for the judged query.

rules.message: {not_relevant_count} judged hit(s) are marked not relevant.
rules.suggested_action: Check whether noisy evidence came from broad query expansion, weak lexical matches, or overly broad trusted corpus chunks.
